title: Advice Surgeries — Navendu Mishra MP
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries — Navendu Mishra MP 0 Skip to Content Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up Folder: FAQs Back Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Advice Surgeries I offer surgery appoints in person, via video meeting and telephone. Please email or telephone my office to book an appointment, including your full name, address and contact number in all correspondence: Email: navendu.mishra.mp@parliament.uk Phone: 0161 480 0833 Upcoming: 10 April (PM) 15 May (PM) 22 May (PM) Please register by contacting me using the email above.
